div1.entryFree: Partial, inclined to favour one party more than the other: and nothing come in p. Meas. II, 1, 31 (let no body speak for me as you do for Claudio). a p. slander sought I to avoid, R2 I, 3, 241 (== reproach of partiality). H4B III, 1, 26. Troil. II, 2, 178. Hml. III, 3, 32. With to: Lr. I, 4, 334. With an inf.: Err. I, 1, 4. Unintelligible: Pilgr. 302.
